vloggerVideos.title: The reel that made Kalyani hungry

quotes.text: You can easily get a satisfying meal without burning a hole in your pocket.
Spicy, cheesy & Lebanese shawarma with a desi twist — best in Kalyani & Kanchrapara.
We tried the non-veg shawarma combo and pan-fried chicken wings. Taste: 09/10.
quotes.author: Khana Pina
